caribbean.headline: Grand Cayman braces for heavy rain and moderate seas today
caribbean.paragraph: Grand Cayman is facing 100% rain probability with southeast swell building to 6.0 ft and 7-second periods under 16-knot winds. Aruba to the south will see slightly stronger conditions at 19 knots, but Grand Cayman's rainfall threat remains the primary concern for operations across the western Caribbean today.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Moderate Rain Risk Dominates Venice Forecast
mediterranean.paragraph: Venice is tracking 62% rain probability with light winds at 15 kt and modest seas of 1.9 ft, while Marseille to the west faces slightly stronger conditions with 18 kt winds. Both ports remain well below warning thresholds, but the significant rain probability across the central Mediterranean warrants standard monitoring through the forecast period.
